content.problemStatement:
You have an array AAA consisting of XXX 000's, YYY 111's and ZZZ 222's.

Check if it is possible to rearrange array AAA such that Ai+Ai+1‚Č•2A_i + A_{i + 1} \ge 2Ai‚Äč+Ai+1‚Äč‚Č•2 for each 1‚Č§i<‚ą£A‚ą£1 \le i < |A|1‚Č§i<‚ą£A‚ą£. Print Yes\text{Yes}Yes or No\text{No}No accordingly.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of input contains 333 integers XXX, YYY and ZZZ.


Output Format
For each test case, output Yes\text{Yes}Yes if there is a valid rearrangement or No\text{No}No otherwise.


It is allowed to print each character in either case, i.e. YES\text{YES}YES, yes\text{yes}yes and yES\text{yES}yES will all be accepted.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1: You have 111 occurrence of 000 and 111 occurrence of 111. The 222 possible arrays are [0,1][0, 1][0,1] and [1,0][1, 0][1,0], but neither satisfies the condition of A1+A2‚Č•2A_1 + A_2 \ge 2A1‚Äč+A2‚Äč‚Č•2.
Test case 2: The array [1,2,0][1, 2, 0][1,2,0] satisfies the necessary conditions.
